title: UserPreferences
description: User preferences for multi-criteria LLM routing. Controls the optimization objective, weight distribution across axes, and hard constraints on cost, latency, and model selection.

optimize_for.description: Primary optimization objective. Presets ('performance', 'cost', etc.) auto-assign weight vectors. Use 'custom' to provide explicit weights.

weights.description: Explicit weight vector for custom optimization. All values must be non-negative and sum to 1.0. Only required when optimize_for='custom'.

w_cost.description: Weight for cost efficiency axis (inverted: lower cost = higher score).

w_latency.description: Weight for inference latency axis (inverted: lower latency = higher score).

w_ecology.description: Weight for ecological impact axis (inverted: lower CO2 = higher score).

budget_per_query_usd.description: Hard budget constraint: maximum USD cost per query. Models exceeding this are filtered out. Null = no budget limit.

max_latency_ms.description: Hard latency constraint: maximum acceptable latency in milliseconds. Models exceeding this are filtered out. Null = no latency limit.

eco_mode.description: When true, applies an ecological bonus to models with known low CO2 footprints, biasing selection toward greener options.

allowed_models.description: Whitelist of model_ids. If non-null, only these models are considered. Null = all models eligible.

excluded_models.description: Blacklist of model_ids to exclude from routing. Null = no exclusions.

preset_weights.description: Default weight vectors for each optimize_for preset.
